arts.ttl: Roma Secure Pisilli’s Future: From Academy Prospect to First-Team Star
arts.sum: Roma are set to reward Niccolò Pisilli's rapid rise with a lucrative new contract, cementing the 20-year-old midfielder's place in the club's long-term plans. The proposed deal would see Pisilli's annual salary increase from €70,000 to around €500,000, with the contract running until 2029. The post Roma Secure Pisilli’s Future: From Academy Prospect to First-Team Star appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Roma v Genoa: Match Preview
arts.sum: An enticing Serie A encounter awaits as Roma host Genoa at the Stadio Olimpico on Friday evening. With just a single point separating the two sides in the middle of the table, both teams will be eager to gain the upper hand and continue their recent positive momentum. arts.ttl: PAULO DYBALA “EA SPORTS FC PLAYER OF THE MONTH” FOR DECEMBER
arts.sum: Serie A EA SPORTS FC Player Of The Month Roma Dybala The EA SPORTS FC Player Of The Month award for December has been assigned to Roma player Paulo Dybala and his Player Of The Month card is available now in EA SPORTS FC™ 25 Ultimate Team mode.

arts.ttl: Dybala: “I Want to Win the Champions League, with Roma or Elsewhere. I Was One Step Away from PSG”
arts.sum: Paulo Dybala made some candid revelations about his future, openly discussing his burning ambition to win the Champions League and potentially leaving Roma to achieve this dream. arts.ttl: Saelemaekers’ Agent in Milan: Roma Deal on the Horizon
arts.sum: A crucial week lies ahead for Alexis Saelemaekers as his future hangs in the balance. Gordon Stipic, the Belgian winger's agent, has arrived in Milan to engage in talks with AC Milan, who hold Saelemaekers' rights, and Roma, who are keen on making his loan move permanent. The post Saelemaekers’ Agent in Milan: Roma Deal on the Horizon appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Roma Set to Hold Crunch Talks with Superstar Forward Over New Deal
arts.sum: Roma sporting director Florent Ghisolfi will soon hold a crunch meeting with Paulo Dybala's entourage, Carlos Novel, to discuss a contract extension. According to Gazzetta dello Sport, the parties will reconvene at the end of the January transfer window to determine La Joya's fate. The post Roma Set to Hold Crunch Talks with Superstar Forward Over New Deal appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
